perturbation.original_text: The terms and conditions herein contained constitute the entire agreement between the Parties with respect to the subject matter of this Sub-Reseller Agreement and supersede any previous and contemporaneous agreements and understandings, whether oral or written, between the Parties hereto with respect to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: The terms and conditions herein contained constitute the entire agreement between the Parties with respect to the subject matter of this Sub-Reseller Agreement, except for any side agreements reached between Reseller and Sub-Reseller, and supersede any previous and contemporaneous agreements and understandings, whether oral or written, between the Parties hereto with respect to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.explanation: This modification introduces an in-text contradiction to the 'Entire Agreement' clause. The original text states that this agreement is the complete understanding between the parties. However, the altered text allows for side agreements between the Reseller and Sub-Reseller. This causes an uncertainty in enforcement, because any other clause in the contract would not have to apply to the 'side agreement'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Entire Agreement. The terms and conditions herein contained constitute the entire agreement between the Parties with respect to the subject matter of this Sub-Reseller Agreement, except for any side agreements reached between Reseller and Sub-Reseller, and supersede any previous and contemporaneous agreements and understandings, whether oral or written, between the Parties hereto with respect to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a significant contradiction by creating an exception to the 'Entire Agreement' clause. The original clause explicitly states that the agreement is the complete understanding between the parties, superseding all prior agreements. The changed text allows for side agreements between the Reseller and Sub-Reseller, which directly undermines the original intent and creates ambiguity regarding which terms are enforceable. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, so the contradiction is in-text.
